name: Kotohime Fuuma
description: Kotohime Fuma is a woman from the Fuuma clan who sided with Orochimaru alongside Arashi Fuma, Jigumo Fuma, Kagero Fuma, and Kamikiri Fuma when the clan fell on hard times. Orochimaru taught her how to play a Koto. She also demonstrated an ability to extend her hair around an opponent.    She seduced Jiraiya in Orochimaru's lair, telling him that she was Orochimaru's mistress, and lured him to a room where both of them will be crushed by the ceiling. Jiraiya managed to prevent that and she is currently living with Hanzaki Fuma and Sasame Fuma.
